code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut has_digit = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has_digit
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v * v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
        has_digit = false
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      has_digit = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in nums
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
